messages.scope: Denote the SCOPE of this change (optional):
messages.subject: Write a SHORT, IMPERATIVE tense description of the change:
messages.body: Provide a LONGER description of the change (optional):
messages.footer: List any ISSUES CLOSED by this change (optional):
messages.confirmCommit: Are you sure you want to proceed with the commit above?

types.name: style:    Formatting, missing semi colons, etc
types.description: Changes that do not affect the meaning of the code

types.name: refactor: Refactoring production code
types.description: A code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature

types.name: perf:     Performance improvements
types.description: A code change that improves performance

types.name: test:     Adding missing tests
types.description: Adding missing tests or correcting existing tests

types.name: chore:    Maintenance tasks
types.description: Changes to the build process or auxiliary tools

types.name: ci:       CI/CD changes
types.description: Changes to CI/CD configuration files and scripts

types.name: build:    Build system changes
types.description: Changes that affect the build system or external dependencies
